017package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023
024/**
025 * JSON Schema subset used by MCP tool {@code inputSchema} objects.
026 */
027@Marshalled
028public class JsonSchema {
029
030   private String type;
031   private Map<String, JsonSchema> properties;
032   private List<String> required;
033   private Object additionalProperties;
034   private JsonSchema items;
035
036   @BeanProp(name="$defs")
037   private Map<String, JsonSchema> defs;
038
039   /**
040    * Schema {@code type} keyword (for example {@code object}).
041    *
042    * @return The type, or {@code null} if not set.
043    */
044   public String getType() {
045      return type;
046   }
047
048   /**
049    * Sets the schema type keyword.
050    *
051    * @param value The new value.
052    * @return This object (for method chaining).
053    */
054   public JsonSchema setType(String value) {
055      type = value;
056      return this;
057   }
058
059   /**
060    * Object property schemas.
061    *
062    * @return The properties map, or {@code null} if not set.
063    */
064   public Map<String, JsonSchema> getProperties() {
065      return properties;
066   }
067
068   /**
069    * Sets object property schemas.
070    *
071    * @param value The new value.
072    * @return This object (for method chaining).
073    */
074   public JsonSchema setProperties(Map<String, JsonSchema> value) {
075      properties = value;
076      return this;
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Required property names.
081    *
082    * @return The required list, or {@code null} if not set.
083    */
084   public List<String> getRequired() {
085      return required;
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Sets required property names.
090    *
091    * @param value The new value.
092    * @return This object (for method chaining).
093    */
094   public JsonSchema setRequired(List<String> value) {
095      required = value;
096      return this;
097   }
098
099   /**
100    * {@code additionalProperties} keyword (boolean or nested schema).
101    *
102    * @return The value, or {@code null} if not set.
103    */
104   public Object getAdditionalProperties() {
105      return additionalProperties;
106   }
107
108   /**
109    * Sets {@code additionalProperties}.
110    *
111    * @param value The new value.
112    * @return This object (for method chaining).
113    */
114   public JsonSchema setAdditionalProperties(Object value) {
115      additionalProperties = value;
116      return this;
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Array {@code items} schema.
121    *
122    * @return The items schema, or {@code null} if not set.
123    */
124   public JsonSchema getItems() {
125      return items;
126   }
127
128   /**
129    * Sets array items schema.
130    *
131    * @param value The new value.
132    * @return This object (for method chaining).
133    */
134   public JsonSchema setItems(JsonSchema value) {
135      items = value;
136      return this;
137   }
138
139   /**
140    * {@code $defs} map for reusable sub-schemas.
141    *
142    * @return The defs map, or {@code null} if not set.
143    */
144   public Map<String, JsonSchema> getDefs() {
145      return defs;
146   }
147
148   /**
149    * Sets {@code $defs}.
150    *
151    * @param value The new value.
152    * @return This object (for method chaining).
153    */
154   public JsonSchema setDefs(Map<String, JsonSchema> value) {
155      defs = value;
156      return this;
157   }
158}
